task_completion.description: The agent has a 'Main_Wing' component open in OpenVSP with exactly two sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP geometry browser shows a 'Main_Wing' component, and the Section tab indicates exactly 2 sections are present.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the Takeoff configuration parameters for the outboard panel and saves the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Plan tab for Section 2 shows Span = 7.5 and Sweep = 20, AND/OR the file manager/terminal shows 'vswing_takeoff.vsp3' has been saved.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the Dash configuration parameters for the outboard panel and saves the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Plan tab for Section 2 shows Span = 4.8 and Sweep = 68, AND/OR the file manager/terminal shows 'vswing_dash.vsp3' has been saved.

task_completion.description: The agent runs the DegenGeom analysis on both configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP DegenGeom analysis dialog is visible and executed, or the file manager/terminal shows the generated DegenGeom CSV files for both the takeoff and dash configurations.

task_completion.description: The agent writes the two projected planform area values to the final report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/sweep_area_report.txt' containing two distinct area values corresponding to the takeoff and dash configurations.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the geometry and run the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenVSP graphical interface (modifying parameters, clicking Analysis > Degen Geom) rather than just writing mock files via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent inspected the generated CSV files to extract the area values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening the DegenGeom CSV files (via text editor, spreadsheet software, or terminal commands like 'cat' or 'grep') to find the 'Main_Wing' projected planform area.

integrity.description: The final report is created only after the DegenGeom analysis is complete.
integrity.visual_evidence: The creation and editing of 'sweep_area_report.txt' happens in the later screenshots, following the generation of the CSV files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Takeoff configuration requires Section 2 LE Sweep = 20.0 degrees and Span = 7.5 m. Dash configuration requires Section 2 LE Sweep = 68.0 degrees and Span = 4.8 m. Note: The initial baseline model provided to the agent is completely empty due to a setup bug. The agent must successfully reconstruct or recover the 'Main_Wing' component before applying the parameters.
